title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices Used in the Cardiovascular System (SAC-MDUCS) - 2020-11-23 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices Used in the Cardiovascular System (SAC-MDUCS) - 2020-11-23
Location: Virtual Date & Time: November 23, 2020, 10:30 AM - 3:00 PM EST Participants: SAC-MDUCS members, guest speakers, Health Canada staff
10:30-10:35 Opening Remarks David Boudreau (Director General, Medical Devices Directorate (MDD))
10:35-10:40 Review of the Agenda and Declaration of Affiliations and Interests Dr. John Ducas (Chair)
10:40-10:50 Summary of Previous Advice Used & General Considerations for Today's Meeting Kevin Day (MDD)
10:50-12:00 Atherectomy Devices for the Treatment of Heavily Calcified Coronary Lesions Dr. Kunal Minhas (Guest Speaker)
12:30-1:30 Use and access to TAVR devices Dr. John Webb Dr. Renzo Cecere
1:30-2:45 Emergence of new TMVR and transcatheter mitral repair devices Dr. Anita Asgar Dr. Vincent Chan (Guest speaker)
2:45-2:50 What Health Canada has heard and Wrap-up Kevin Day (MDD)
2:50-3:00 Next Steps, Closing Remarks and Adjournment of Meeting Dr. John Ducas (Chair)
